last_assistant_message:
已完成。我在 README.md 中添加了"通过 go install 安装 scripts 下的工具"章节，说明了如何安装以下工具：

- **entrypoint** - 容器入口点程序
- **shell-init** - Shell 初始化工具
- **vibe-init** - Vibe 初始化工具
- **vsc-init** - VS Code 配置初始化工具

注意 `vsc-init` 的模块路径是 `github.com/117503445/vsc-init`（不是 `docker-dev` 的子路径），而其他三个工具都在 `github.com/117503445/docker-dev/` 下。

完成。修改总结：

**go.mod 模块路径修正：**
- `scripts/entrypoint/go.mod`: `github.com/117503445/docker-dev/entrypoint` → `github.com/117503445/docker-dev/scripts/entrypoint`
- `scripts/shell-init/go.mod`: `github.com/117503445/docker-dev/shell-init` → `github.com/117503445/docker-dev/scripts/shell-init`
- `scripts/vibe-init/go.mod`: `github.com/117503445/docker-dev/vibe-init` → `github.com/117503445/docker-dev/scripts/vibe-init`
- `scripts/vsc-init/go.mod`: `github.com/117503445/vsc-init` → `github.com/117503445/docker-dev/scripts/vsc-init`

**vsc-init 内部导入修正：**
- `main.go` 和 `pkg/ext/ext.go` 中的导入路径已更新

**README.md 添加的安装命令：**
```sh
# shell-init - Shell 初始化工具
go install github.com/117503445/docker-dev/scripts/shell-init@latest

# vibe-init - Vibe 初始化工具
go install github.com/117503445/docker-dev/scripts/vibe-init@latest

# vsc-init - VS Code 配置初始化工具
go install github.com/117503445/docker-dev/scripts/vsc-init@latest
```

已添加以下二进制文件到 `.gitignore`：
- `scripts/entrypoint/entrypoint`
- `scripts/shell-init/shell-init`
- `scripts/vibe-init/vibe-init`
- `scripts/vsc-init/vsc-init`
